title: 奮い立たせてくれるもの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Kokura Kinen just around the corner,
Nice Nature becomes discouraged after seeing
Tokai Teio's brilliance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To help rekindle Nice Nature's spirits, I take her
to the shopping district in Kokura to mingle with
the locals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After meeting the locals, Nice Nature manages to
brighten back up, just as I hoped.
